connectorUiConfig.title: Major Build AI Invocations
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Major Build](https://www.major.build) connector ingests AI agent invocation records from the Major Build platform into Microsoft Sentinel. Each record captures who ran an AI agent, which application and resource integration was used, what data was accessed (including raw SQL queries), and whether the invocation succeeded. Use this connector to audit AI agent activity, detect anomalous usage patterns, and investigate security-relevant actions performed by AI agents in your environment.

sampleQueries.description: All invocations in the last 24 hours
sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc

MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | summarize InvocationCount = count() by UserName_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
 | sort by InvocationCount desc

sampleQueries.description: All SQL queries executed by AI agents
sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | where ResourceType_s == "postgresql"
 | extend SqlQuery = tostring(parse_json(Payload_s).sql)
 | where isnotempty(SqlQuery)
 | summarize count() by SqlQuery
 | sort by count_ desc

MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | where Status_s != "success"
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: First-time resource type access per user
sampleQueries.query:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated) by UserName_s, ResourceType_s
 | where FirstSeen >= ago(7d)
 | sort by FirstSeen desc

dataTypes.name: MajorBuildInvocations_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
MajorBuildInvocations_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions on the Log Analytics workspace are required.

customs.name: Major Build API Key
customs.description: A Major Build API key is required. Generate one at https://app.major.build under Settings → API Keys.

instructionSteps.title: Connect Major Build AI Invocations to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To enable the connector, provide your Major Build API key below. The connector will poll the Major Build Invocations API every 5 minutes and ingest records into the **MajorBuildInvocations_CL** table.

> **Note:** You can generate or rotate your API key at [app.major.build](https://app.major.build) under **Settings → API Keys**.
